summary: Frontend testing completed for Street Prime Detail landing page after refactoring from monolithic App.js (~1800 lines) to 14 modular components + constants file. All 17 requested features verified and working correctly. Refactoring successful - functionality identical to pre-refactor state.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring well executed - App.js reduced from ~1800 lines to ~40 lines
All data-testid attributes preserved across components
Legal pages (LegalPages.js) properly implemented with routing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly post-refactoring. Components are modular and well-organized. Legal pages (/terminos and /privacidad) render correctly with proper routing. Google Reviews uses MOCKED fallback data (FALLBACK_REVIEWS array in server.py). Brand carousel uses CSS animation with 25s duration and 3x duplication for infinite scroll effect.

hero_section.details: Background image, WhatsApp CTA button (data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn'), phone number (55 7250 2791) all present

navbar.details: Fixed at top with logo and 'Agenda ahora' WhatsApp button (data-testid='nav-whatsapp-btn')

pricing_section.details: 7 vehicle types, 3 packages, 5 upsells. Vehicle selector works, prices update, total calculation correct, WhatsApp CTA appears after package selection

quote_form.details: All 5 fields render (name, phone, vehicle, model, message), 3 package buttons, 5 upsell toggles, submit button generates WhatsApp link

google_reviews.details: Star rating displayed, navigation arrows working (data-testid='review-prev', 'review-next'), leave review link present

coverage_zone.details: Google Maps iframe present, 12 zone tags displayed

cta_section.details: WhatsApp button (data-testid='cta-whatsapp-btn') and phone number (55 7250 2791) present

affiliated_brands.details: 4 brands (Meguiar's, Armor All, Turtle Wax, Pro Elite) with infinite scroll (12 items total)

footer.details: Packages, services, contact info with email (contacto@streetprimedetail.com), legal links all present

legal_links_target_blank.details: Both /terminos and /privacidad links have target='_blank' in footer

terms_page.details: /terminos renders correctly with 14 sections, business info, RFC, all legal content

privacy_page.details: /privacidad renders correctly with 12 sections, LFPDPPP reference, Meta Pixel disclosure

mocked_apis.google_reviews: Uses FALLBACK_REVIEWS array in server.py when Google Places API unavailable
